_README: Full-scale / ring corroded-pipe BURST tests: measured failure pressure vs B31G prediction. Validates the metal-loss engine (b31g.js failurePressure) against real bursts -- the engine's predicted P_f (SF=1) is compared to the measured burst pressure. yield_MPa is the ACTUAL measured yield of each specimen (used as SMYS so the comparison isolates method error, not material over-strength). Defect = single axial metal-loss patch / cluster envelope (length L, max depth d). All values transcribed from the cited source tables; nothing fabricated or read off a figure. Run via ../benchmark/run.js.

sources.EFA2020: Failure pressure estimation error for corroded pipeline using various revisions of ASME B31G, Engineering Failure Analysis 108 (2020) 104284 (Table 4, IDTS burst-test series), DOI 10.1016/j.engfailanal.2019.104284
sources.QI2023: Qi C. et al., Experiments and evaluation on residual strength of X52 steel pipe with various internal defects, Front. Energy Res. 10 (2023) 1046900, DOI 10.3389/fenrg.2022.1046900

specimens.note: single corrosion defect; yield ~402 MPa (paper reports specimen range 392-413)
